query:
INSERT INTO `charger_brands` (
  `brand`, `model`, `displayName`, `imageUrl`,
  `ocppVersion`, `ocppPasswordRequired`,
  `charge_type`, `defaultPowerKw`, `maxPowerKw`,
  `minChargingCurrentA`, `maxChargingCurrentA`,
  `defaultVoltage`, `phases`,
  `supportedConnectors`, `supportedMeasurands`,
  `energyUnit`,
  `supportsSoC`, `supportsPowerMeasurement`, `supportsCurrentMeasurement`, `supportsVoltageMeasurement`,
  `supportsRemoteStart`, `supportsRemoteStop`, `supportsReset`,
  `supportsReservation`, `supportsSmartCharging`, `supportsFirmwareUpdate`,
  `ocppConfig`, `meterValueInterval`,
  `cloudApiBaseUrl`, `cloudApiAuthMethod`, `cloudApiDocsUrl`,
  `notes`
) VALUES (
  'Wallbox', 'Pulsar Max', 'Wallbox Pulsar Max', NULL,
  '1.6', false,
  'AC', 7.40, 22.00,
  6, 32,
  230, 1,
  '["TYPE_1", "TYPE_2", "GBT_AC"]',
  '["Energy.Active.Import.Register", "Current.Import", "Current.Offered", "Voltage"]',
  'Wh',
  false, false, true, true,
  true, true, true,
  false, true, true,
  '{"MeterValueSampleInterval": 30, "MeterValuesSampledData": "Energy.Active.Import.Register,Current.Import,Voltage", "ClockAlignedDataInterval": 0, "StopTransactionOnInvalidId": true, "AuthorizeRemoteTxRequests": true, "LocalPreAuthorize": false, "HeartbeatInterval": 300, "ConnectionTimeOut": 60, "ResetRetries": 3, "TransactionMessageAttempts": 5, "TransactionMessageRetryInterval": 30}',
  30,
  'https://api.wall-box.com', 'basic', 'https://github.com/SKB-CGN/wallbox',
  'Wallbox Pulsar Max - Sucesor del Pulsar Plus. OCPP 1.6J. Solo reporta Energy.Active.Import.Register en Wh via OCPP. La potencia debe estimarse por diferencia de energia. SoC del vehiculo NO disponible (ni por OCPP ni por API cloud). Potencia real disponible via API cloud (charging_power). Dejar password OCPP vacio. Soporta Power Sharing y Solar Charging. IP55/IK10. PEN fault protection integrada.'
);

INSERT INTO `charger_brands` (
  `brand`, `model`, `displayName`, `imageUrl`,
  `ocppVersion`, `ocppPasswordRequired`,
  `charge_type`, `defaultPowerKw`, `maxPowerKw`,
  `minChargingCurrentA`, `maxChargingCurrentA`,
  `defaultVoltage`, `phases`,
  `supportedConnectors`, `supportedMeasurands`,
  `energyUnit`,
  `supportsSoC`, `supportsPowerMeasurement`, `supportsCurrentMeasurement`, `supportsVoltageMeasurement`,
  `supportsRemoteStart`, `supportsRemoteStop`, `supportsReset`,
  `supportsReservation`, `supportsSmartCharging`, `supportsFirmwareUpdate`,
  `ocppConfig`, `meterValueInterval`,
  `cloudApiBaseUrl`, `cloudApiAuthMethod`, `cloudApiDocsUrl`,
  `notes`
) VALUES (
  'Wallbox', 'Pulsar Plus', 'Wallbox Pulsar Plus', NULL,
  '1.6', false,
  'AC', 7.40, 22.00,
  6, 32,
  230, 1,
  '["TYPE_1", "TYPE_2", "GBT_AC"]',
  '["Energy.Active.Import.Register"]',
  'Wh',
  false, false, false, false,
  true, true, true,
  false, false, true,
  '{"MeterValueSampleInterval": 30, "MeterValuesSampledData": "Energy.Active.Import.Register", "ClockAlignedDataInterval": 0, "StopTransactionOnInvalidId": true, "AuthorizeRemoteTxRequests": true, "LocalPreAuthorize": false, "HeartbeatInterval": 300}',
  30,
  'https://api.wall-box.com', 'basic', 'https://github.com/SKB-CGN/wallbox',
  'Wallbox Pulsar Plus - Modelo anterior al Max. OCPP 1.6J. Solo reporta Energy.Active.Import.Register en Wh. SoC NO disponible. Potencia debe estimarse por diferencia de energia.'
);

INSERT INTO `charger_brands` (
  `brand`, `model`, `displayName`,
  `ocppVersion`, `ocppPasswordRequired`,
  `charge_type`, `defaultPowerKw`, `maxPowerKw`,
  `minChargingCurrentA`, `maxChargingCurrentA`,
  `defaultVoltage`, `phases`,
  `supportedConnectors`, `supportedMeasurands`,
  `energyUnit`,
  `supportsSoC`, `supportsPowerMeasurement`, `supportsCurrentMeasurement`, `supportsVoltageMeasurement`,
  `supportsRemoteStart`, `supportsRemoteStop`, `supportsReset`,
  `supportsReservation`, `supportsSmartCharging`, `supportsFirmwareUpdate`,
  `ocppConfig`, `meterValueInterval`,
  `notes`
) VALUES (
  'Genérico', 'OCPP 1.6 Estándar', 'Cargador Genérico OCPP 1.6',
  '1.6', false,
  'AC', 7.00, 22.00,
  6, 32,
  230, 1,
  '["TYPE_1", "TYPE_2", "CCS_1", "CCS_2", "CHADEMO", "GBT_AC", "GBT_DC"]',
  '["Energy.Active.Import.Register", "Power.Active.Import", "Current.Import", "Voltage", "SoC"]',
  'Wh',
  true, true, true, true,
  true, true, true,
  true, true, true,
  '{"MeterValueSampleInterval": 30, "MeterValuesSampledData": "Energy.Active.Import.Register,Power.Active.Import,Current.Import,Voltage,SoC", "HeartbeatInterval": 300}',
  30,
  'Perfil genérico para cargadores OCPP 1.6 estándar. Asume soporte completo de todos los measurands. Ajustar según el cargador real.'
);

INSERT INTO `charger_brands` (
  `brand`, `model`, `displayName`,
  `ocppVersion`, `ocppPasswordRequired`,
  `charge_type`, `defaultPowerKw`, `maxPowerKw`,
  `minChargingCurrentA`, `maxChargingCurrentA`,
  `defaultVoltage`, `phases`,
  `supportedConnectors`, `supportedMeasurands`,
  `energyUnit`,
  `supportsSoC`, `supportsPowerMeasurement`, `supportsCurrentMeasurement`, `supportsVoltageMeasurement`,
  `supportsRemoteStart`, `supportsRemoteStop`, `supportsReset`,
  `supportsReservation`, `supportsSmartCharging`, `supportsFirmwareUpdate`,
  `ocppConfig`, `meterValueInterval`,
  `notes`
) VALUES (
  'Genérico', 'OCPP 2.0.1 Estándar', 'Cargador Genérico OCPP 2.0.1',
  '2.0.1', false,
  'DC', 50.00, 150.00,
  0, 200,
  400, 3,
  '["CCS_1", "CCS_2", "CHADEMO", "GBT_DC"]',
  '["Energy.Active.Import.Register", "Power.Active.Import", "Current.Import", "Voltage", "SoC", "Temperature"]',
  'Wh',
  true, true, true, true,
  true, true, true,
  true, true, true,
  '{"SampledDataCtrlr.TxUpdatedInterval": 30, "SampledDataCtrlr.TxUpdatedMeasurands": "Energy.Active.Import.Register,Power.Active.Import,Current.Import,Voltage,SoC"}',
  30,
  'Perfil genérico para cargadores OCPP 2.0.1. Típicamente cargadores DC rápidos. Asume soporte completo de measurands.'
);
